_meta.purpose: Geodesic ground-truth control points for the P1850 verification harness (foundation-reset §2 GEODETIC LOCK). STORED ONCE — verify.js runs NEVER hit the network.
_meta.provenance: OSM Overpass way-intersection nodes (shared node between the two named street ways), fetched 2026-07-11. Canonical source of record: tools/map-overlay.py CONTROL_POINTS (docs repo) and the core.geodeticLock audit (src/core/06-debug.js), verbatim. SF's downtown grid is unchanged since O'Farrell 1847, so modern intersections are valid 1846-56 ground truth.
_meta.regenerate: tools/map-overlay.py holds the Overpass query used to obtain these; re-run it to refresh, then update this file. The harness intentionally does not fetch at run time.
_meta.fields: name, lat (WGS84), lon (WGS84), u (grid metres E), v (grid metres N in the reprojected data/streets-geometry.json frame)

yardstick_m_per_deg_at_37p795N.note: Snyder WGS84 @37.795N; the affine absorbs a uniform scale so fit RMS is identical to the repo's 111320 constant.
